pi_items.source: Verified by inspecting setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which remove and check this exact file path.
Verified by inspecting setup_task.sh which generates the CSV file at this exact location.

privileged_info_summary: The task expects the output experiment file to be saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/pursuit_tracking.psyexp. The trajectory data used in the task is purely synthetic, dynamically generated via a python script in setup_task.sh, and saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/assets/trajectory.csv. The trajectory data contains exactly 600 rows, corresponding to a mathematically generated Lissajous curve.
